transcript: It's been one hell of a remarkable journey. It's actually my third Breakpoint actually. I mean the first Breakpoint I ever been to was Lisbon. I was sitting, like you guys, watching the stage being like, 'God dammit, I want to be like this in the next two or three years.' And I made it, you know. Thanks to my team, my co-founder Dean and Jim. Without them, my team, the smartest cryptographers I ever met in my life and one of the best CTOs I ever worked with, we wouldn't have Zeus work till this point. So, who here knows about zBTC? Raise your hands. I guess a lot of you hold zBTC in the first place. You know, we are the first ever protocol to enable SPV proof into Solana. Every Bitcoin transaction you see through zBTC is actually validated by Solana as a blockchain itself. There is a lot of critical reasons why we are building this and there is a billion reasons why you should listen to this carefully. So talk about history. We have done over 250 million dollars transactions for the last seven months ever since we got on mainnet. We have done over 40 plus protocol integration with DeFi projects. More so we have distributed over 16 million dollars of revenue to zBTC holders. And more importantly, all of these zBTC holders has done their wrapping process in the permissionless matters. So you know we are still the third largest BTC on Solana till this today. The first one obviously you guys know cbBTC and wBTC, but there is a big differentiation for zBTC and them is that we are the only permissionless Bitcoin ever exist on Solana where you can wrap your native Bitcoin without KYC and KYB. There are a lot to announce, but one thing we want to put this straight where we have built more than four dApps on Solana, Bitcoin dApps on Solana. And then today we are combining all these dApps into one super app, called Zeus Super App, where you don't have to figure out... how do you earn more BTC with your SOL like through BTC SOL? How do you earn more yield with your BTC position through Apollo where you can wrap BTC to zBTC? We are going to put everything into one platform making sure that you can earn your BTC effortlessly with one click of use. But there is more clash to that. There is a lot of bottlenecks that we see, we face for the last seven months ever since we got on mainnet... Frankly speaking we are probably the only protocol team on Solana facing this issue is that we were on the frontier asking for liquidity to a lot of Bitcoin institutional miners and hedge funds or family offices. But I think one of the bottlenecks that we ever encountered is that there is only a handful of security module that ensure their Bitcoin can come safely to Solana such as Fireblocks, Coinbase, et cetera. But more so, a lot of institution... it's not like they don't want to put their Bitcoin to Solana, it's that they don't trust the security module because... due to several reasons is that a lot of all these OG miners, they're not used to earning yield with their BTC positions. A lot of all these large holders, they don't want to take the risk of losing their BTC position on Solana as well. So what if... what if we can change this notion, enhance the security, ensuring the next millions of Bitcoin holders in the next three to five years can come to Solana freely, permissionlessly, anytime, anywhere, no KYC, KYB. And today, the custody is blocking the adoption especially with the UTXO asset and Bitcoin coming to Solana. Like I said, I think the current bottleneck that we are facing right now is that a lot of all these MPC modules are very expensive. Charging ranging from 10 to 30k a month. It's not suitable for retail or mid-sized holders. And more so, they are closed-source. So a lot of Bitcoin that you deposit into all these centralized wrapper or bridges, they are just... a lot of times they are just one TSS node... transacts all these transaction between native BTC to Solana. Whereas Zeus, we have seven guardians ensuring all these transaction are done in the fair manners with the most secure modules. More so, none of these MPC that are on the market right now are catering to the existence of Solana as an execution layer. So you know what Zeus has done differently is that we enable Solana to execute, to validate all these Bitcoin transaction. We're not the company, the team to validate your Bitcoins. So, you know, like I said, BTC cannot scale until the custody evolves. So today, we are presenting the Zeus MPC, catering for Bitcoin and UTXO assets on Solana where we see the future of Solana transacting all these UTXO assets in the permissionless manners. So imagine this, you hold 10,000 Zcash, 10,000 Litecoin, 10,000 Doge sitting in your laptop doing nothing. But what if I'm telling you right now that in the next few months, years that there will be a USB plug that you can run your own custodians and then you can plug into Solana and you can mint your own UTXO asset into any different forms you want and earn the yield on Solana DeFi with no KYC, KYB. There's a lot of reason why I'm saying this is important is that, you know, due to a lot of demographic users in Asia, a lot of them cannot register the Coinbase accounts, Prime account or institutional accounts. But what if we enable this Zeus MPC to enable more Bitcoin transactions and UTXO asset coming to Solana with no KYC, KYB? But more importantly you can run your own custodians without third party involves. And everything is validated and transacted by Solana, the blockchain itself, not by the third party team. What Zeus MPC is going to unlock is more than just liquidities. It's one of a kind where we enable the self-custodian minting process for your security modules that where you can deposit your UTXO asset to Solana with no third party. And more so, you don't have to rely on centralized parties anymore. You know, you can rely on us, our MPC modules that you can plug in anytime, anywhere you want. You know, like I said, you know we are just getting started with this task and the mission. I think we have acquired our first customers users ever and which we have announced a month, two months ago, is Jupiter. Jupiter will use Zeus UTXO MPC stacks to enable more Bitcoin, native Bitcoin validations into their product forms. Imagine this, once Zeus finish up this UTXO MPC modules, every Solana DeFi protocols, every Solana dApps can enable this and run their own custodians. So there will be the future where I envision there will be Radiant BTC, perhaps JupeBTC, Kamino BTC, Kamino Zcash, any kinds of forms of UTXO asset can be transformed into a self-custodian way through this module. I don't have to mention about the potential of UTXO assets. There's roughly about, besides BTC, there's roughly about 42 billion dollars of assets sitting there and there are less than 0.4% of the liquidities are actually being used on-chains. So think about this. What if Zeus UTXO MPC can enable all these assets coming to Solana freely, no KYC, KYB? Now the Zcash whale can run on this. Now the Litecoin Foundation can actually run their own custodian and come into Solana. There's a lot of cool things that you can do with all these MPC modules. Without further ado, I just want to mention again that what Zeus has done from the past and what we're going to do in the future is that, you know, we want to make sure that more UTXO assets are executed on Solana as a blockchain. More institution will be onboarded through this Zeus UTXO MPC. And more yield and lending and liquidity growth will be happening on Solana, specifically coming from UTXO assets. And then without all these elements, I think Zeus, what Zeus trying to achieve is to ensure that we can cater all kinds of users and holders coming to Solana, not just for centralized custodians providers. So last but not the least, we have the Zeus Super App for the user layers. We have the Zeus UTXO MPC catering for institutions where protocols to enable any forms of UTXO asset coming to Solana. And last but the most important, Solana will be the best execution layer for the crypto internet markets. So thank you guys.

# Jupiter Unveils JupUSD and a New Era of Onchain Finance at Breakpoint
JupUSD anchors Jupiter’s push toward integrated, compliant, and institutional-grade onchain finance on Solana
![Yasmin Werner](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/cropped-cropped-CCIcon-32x32.png)By[Yasmin Werner](https://coincentral.com/author/yasmin/)December 12, 2025**3 Mins Read
![](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/jupiter.jpg "Jupiter Unveils JupUSD and a New Era of Onchain Finance at Breakpoint")
## TLDR
* JupUSD becomes Jupiter’s core stablecoin across swaps, lending, perps, and strategies
* Jupiter Lend exits beta, boosting stablecoin efficiency with higher LTVs and lower penalties
* JupUSD shifts from standalone asset to infrastructure powering Solana-native DeFi
* KRW-pegged stablecoin signals Solana’s growing focus on regulated, institutional finance
* New data, verification, and trading tools support scalable, professional onchain markets
Jupiter announced a coordinated expansion of onchain finance capabilities at Breakpoint, centered on JupUSD and integrated infrastructure upgrades. The update combines stablecoins, lending, data, and trading into a single Solana-native stack. As a result, JupUSD anchors a broader push toward compliant, scalable, and professional onchain finance.
## JupUSD Expands Stablecoin Utility Across Jupiter
[Jupiter](https://coincentral.com/jupiter-targets-full-launch-of-prediction-market-platform-before-2026/)introduced JupUSD as a deeply integrated stablecoin designed to operate across its full product suite. The platform embedded JupUSD into swaps, perpetuals, lending, and automated strategies. Consequently, JupUSD supports consistent liquidity while sharing platform economics with active users.
JupUSD connects stable value with execution layers already processing billions in volume on Solana. Therefore, the design enables protocol-level coordination instead of isolated stablecoin usage. JupUSD also supports rewards during holding periods across multiple onchain features.
The rollout positions JupUSD as infrastructure rather than a standalone asset. Jupiter aligned issuance, routing, and incentives to strengthen onchain activity. As a result, JupUSD appears across web, mobile, and API surfaces as a default settlement asset.
Jupiter paired JupUSD with upgrades to lending and yield systems supporting stable demand. Jupiter Lend exited beta after rapid supply growth and released open source code. This environment allows JupUSD liquidity to move efficiently across borrowing, trading, and structured strategies.
Jupiter Lend uses tick-based liquidity built with Fluid for efficient liquidations. Consequently, the protocol offers higher loan ratios and lower penalties than comparable markets. These conditions

* * * # Jupiter Unveils JupUSD Stablecoin and Major DeFi Upgrades at Solana Breakpoint 2025
Story Highlights
* Jupiter launches JupUSD stablecoin & 8 major upgrades, boosting Solana DeFi with lending, trading tools, rewards & ecosystem safety.
* Solana’s top DEX aggregator Jupiter unveils JupUSD, open-source lending, new Terminal & $1M rewards to fuel DeFi growth.
Jupiter, the top[decentralized exchange](https://coinpedia.org/decentralized-exchange/)(DEX) aggregator on Solana, has unveiled a comprehensive suite of eight major upgrades at Solana Breakpoint 2025, designed to transform the platform into a full-scale DeFi hub. The primary goals of these upgrades are to simplify DeFi, improve safety, and complete Jupiter’s offerings beyond just token swaps.
[Advertisement](https://coinpedia.org/advertising/)[](https://bit.ly/4qIkEoO)
## **JupUSD Brings a Native Stablecoin**
The biggest[announcement](https://x.com/JupiterExchange/status/1999154800982729175?s=20)is JupUSD, a new dollar-backed[stablecoin](https://coinpedia.org/beginners-guide/what-are-stablecoins/)built with Ethena. Unlike most stablecoins that live separately from apps, JupUSD is designed to work directly inside Jupiter’s products. Users will be able to use it while setting up DCA strategies, placing limit orders, and taking part in prediction markets, while also earning rewards. Jupiter believes that owning both the stablecoin and the platform allows funds to move more smoothly across swaps, perpetual trades, and lending. JupUSD is set to launch next week and will tap into the large trading volumes already

tags.impact_reason: Zeus Network's super app and permissionless BTC wrapping are solid updates that could improve DeFi accessibility on Solana.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose the anchor of a high-tech device 'wrapping' a raw, crystalline gold monolith to visually narrate the story of Zeus Network bridging the modern Solana ecosystem with the established value of Bitcoin. The gold monolith symbolizes the 'custody bottleneck' and the vast, locked-up capital in the UTXO economy. The sleek device represents the MPC stack creating a permissionless conduit for this value. I included the text 'UTXO' as a diegetic element on a holographic display to anchor the concept in the specific technology being harnessed, as highlighted in the standfirst.
visual_idea.description: A colossal, raw, crystalline gold monolith, representing Bitcoin, looms from the bottom of the frame. Clamped onto its side is a sleek device of polished obsidian and glowing green/purple circuitry—the Zeus Network MPC stack. This device sends out thin, pulsing fiber-optic cables that wrap around the monolith like roots. Where the device makes contact, the solid gold dematerializes into streams of liquid light, flowing up through the cables. On the side of the obsidian device, a small holographic display projects the glowing, cyber-punk letters 'UTXO'. The background is a vast, dark, cavernous space with digital haze and deep, atmospheric shadows.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A colossal, raw, crystalline gold monolith, representing Bitcoin, looms majestically from the bottom of the frame, its rough facets catching the warm, amber light with intense reflections. Clamped onto its side is a sleek device crafted from polished obsidian, its surface subtly reflecting the ambient light, integrated with glowing green and purple circuitry that pulsates rhythmically. This device, identified as the Zeus Network MPC stack, sends out numerous thin, pulsing fiber-optic cables that intricately wrap around the colossal monolith like organic roots. Where the obsidian device makes contact, the solid gold of the monolith spectacularly dematerializes into vivid streams of liquid golden light, which then flow dynamically up and through the fiber-optic cables. On the side of the polished obsidian device, a small holographic display projects the glowing, cyber-punk letters 'UTXO' in vibrant green. The background is a vast, dark, cavernous space, filled with a deep digital haze and intense, atmospheric shadows, through which dramatic volumetric light beams cut, emphasizing the epic scale and height. The composition is vertical (3:4), focusing on the monumental height of the monolith and creating significant negative space at the top, making the subject feel truly colossal. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, cinematic lighting, dramatic volumetric light, ultra-photorealistic, deep shadows, reflective surfaces, glowing elements.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose the anchor of a high-tech device 'wrapping' a raw, crystalline gold monolith to visually narrate the story of Zeus Network bridging the modern Solana ecosystem with the established value of Bitcoin. The gold monolith symbolizes the 'custody bottleneck' and the vast, locked-up capital in the UTXO economy. The sleek device represents the MPC stack creating a permissionless conduit for this value. I included the text 'UTXO' as a diegetic element on a holographic display to anchor the concept in the specific technology being harnessed, as highlighted in the standfirst.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on the point of contact between the Zeus Network device and the Bitcoin monolith. The texture of the futuristic, polished obsidian clamp is contrasted sharply against the rough, ancient facets of the crystalline gold. We see the gold at the junction point beginning to fracture and dissolve into pixelated light, being drawn into the glowing apertures of the device's circuitry. The image is an abstract study in contrasting materials and the transfer of energy, with no text visible.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro shot focusing tightly on the precise point of contact between a futuristic Zeus Network device and an ancient Bitcoin monolith. The composition is square (1:1 aspect ratio), with perfect symmetry and central focus, filling the entire frame with intricate texture. The device features a sleek, highly polished obsidian clamp, jet-black and intensely reflective, its smooth surface contrasting sharply against the rough, ancient facets of the crystalline gold Bitcoin monolith. Warm amber and golden-hour lighting casts dramatic shadows and illuminates the gold with luminous highlights. At the junction point, the crystalline gold begins to visibly fracture and dissolve into shimmering, pixelated light, with vibrant golden particles and dust motes suspended in the air. This pixelated light is intensely drawn into the glowing apertures and intricate circuitry of the Zeus Network device, visualized by strong volumetric light beams and an atmospheric haze that emphasizes the transfer of energy. The glowing apertures emanate a soft, internal radiance. The image is an abstract study in contrasting materials, the harsh future meeting the raw past, and the dynamic, almost violent, transfer of luminous energy. No text or numbers are visible. 8k, 16k, octane render, ZBrush, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, high dynamic range, cinematic, ultra quality.

editorial.headline: Zeus Network Unveils Institutional MPC Stack; Jupiter Confirmed as First Partner
editorial.standfirst: Justin Wang attacks the "custody bottleneck" blocking billions in Bitcoin capital, positioning Solana as the execution layer for the entire UTXO economy.
key_takeaways: Zeus MPC launches as a self-custodial infrastructure enabling permissionless wrapping of BTC, LTC, and DOGE without centralized intermediaries.
Jupiter will utilize Zeus MPC stacks to power native Bitcoin validations directly within its product suite, marking the first major institutional integration.
The protocol is targeting the $42B dormant UTXO market with a "USB plug" style node solution to replace expensive legacy custodians like Fireblocks.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a direct challenge to the centralized custody model that dominates crypto, **Zeus Network** CEO Justin Wang unveiled the **Zeus MPC** (Multi-Party Computation) infrastructure at Breakpoint 2025. The announcement pivots the protocol from a consumer-facing bridge to a foundational infrastructure layer, explicitly designed to dismantle the "custody bottleneck" that Wang argues is preventing institutional Bitcoin adoption. Currently, legacy MPC providers charge upwards of $10,000 to $30,000 monthly for closed-source solutions, effectively gating the market for mid-sized funds and miners.

The core of the new offering is a self-custodial, permissionless stack that allows institutions to wrap native **Bitcoin** (and eventually **Zcash**, **Litecoin**, and **Dogecoin**) onto Solana without relying on third-party trust. Wang described a future hardware-software integration—likened to a "USB plug"—that would allow asset managers to run their own guardian nodes. This shifts the validation of UTXO assets to the Solana blockchain itself, rather than a centralized federation, theoretically eliminating the counterparty risk associated with current market leaders like wBTC.

Validation for the new stack was immediate, with Wang confirming **Jupiter** as the first institutional partner to integrate Zeus MPC. The Solana DEX aggregator will use the infrastructure to enable native Bitcoin validations within its own product suite, signaling a move towards "JupBTC" or similar native integrations. This partnership is critical; it transforms Zeus from a standalone protocol into a backend standard for Solana DeFi applications seeking direct access to Bitcoin liquidity.

The strategic implication is a bid for the $42 billion in idle UTXO assets sitting in dormant wallets. By enabling a permissionless bridge for assets like Zcash and Doge, Zeus is positioning Solana as the universal execution layer for the non-smart contract crypto economy. If successful, this effectively outsources the security and yield-generation of Proof-of-Work chains to Solana’s high-velocity DeFi markets.
